dialogueChunks.intro: The area around the {quest_focus} is more contested than expected. The {enemy_type} have established a presence near {location_hint} and are not giving ground easily.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You will need to push past the {quest_threat} and collect what we need from the area. {quest_ally} estimates the richest deposits are scattered across the contested ground near {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Gather everything you can carry. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} depending on you pushing past this resistance.

dialogueChunks.intro: The first batch you brought back was not enough. {quest_ally} says we need more {quest_item} and the only remaining source is closer to {location_hint}, deeper into dangerous territory.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} knows a route {location_hint} that avoids the worst of the {quest_threat}, but it passes through rough ground where the {enemy_type} forage. You will need to collect supplies from along the way.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get out there and bring back what we need for the {quest_stakes}. Time is not on our side.

dialogueChunks.intro: A complication: {target_npc} says another settlement is also after the {quest_focus}. They have sent their own people to claim it, and they reached the area first.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We cannot afford to lose this. {quest_ally} suggests we collect what remains from alternate sites near {location_hint} while the competition is focused on the main deposit. The {enemy_type} in the area do not care who they attack.
dialogueChunks.outro: Scour the secondary sites and bring back enough to meet our needs. The {quest_stakes} cannot wait for negotiations.
